summary: Made a minimal seam pass to improve handoff with adjacent chapters by re-anchoring the opening on the house instead of a repeated temporal lead-in and by clarifying the siblings' continued silence around the landing voice at the chapter exit.
edits: Rephrased the opening paragraph to start from the House of Oaths itself while preserving the same morning state and Reed Gate setup.
Adjusted the late-morning transition wording to avoid repeating the opening's temporal scaffold.
Added a brief closing beat that keeps the landing voice unnamed, aligning the chapter's exit with chapter 3's inland ride.
